criteria...","rows":2,"name":"businessContext","className":"w-full"}},{"type":"Grid","props":{"cols":2,"gap":3},"children":[{"type":"Button","props":{"variant":"outline","onClick":"clearForm","className":"w-full"},"children":"Clear"},{"type":"Button","props":{"variant":"primary","onClick":"createTask","className":"w-full"},"children":"Create Task"}]}]}]},{"id":"task-timeline-view","type":"Card","position":{"row":5,"col":3,"rowSpan":2,"colSpan":2},"props":{"title":"Task Timeline","description":"Visual timeline of task creation, updates, and completion","className":"bg-white"},"children":[{"type":"Container","props":{"className":"h-64 overflow-y-auto"},"children":[{"type":"Grid","props":{"cols":1,"gap":2,"className":"relative"},"children":"{{timelineItems}}"}]}]},{"id":"active-tasks-kanban","type":"Card","position":{"row":7,"col":1,"rowSpan":3,"colSpan":4},"props":{"title":"Task max-h-48","data-task-status":"completed"},"children":"{{completedTaskCards}}"}]}]}]},{"id":"analytics-dashboard","type":"Grid","position":{"row":10,"col":1,"rowSpan":2,"colSpan":4},"props":{"cols":3,"gap":4},"children":[{"type":"Card","props":{"title":"Priority Effectiveness Analysis","description":"Impact vs Priority correlation analysis","className":"bg-white"},"children":[{"type":"Progress","props":{"value":"{{priorityAccuracy}}","max":100,"className":"mb-4"}},{"type":"Container","props":{"className":"space-y-2"},"children":[{"type":"Grid","props":{"cols":2,"gap":2,"className":"text-sm"},"children":[{"type":"Container","children":"Accuracy Rate:"},{"type":"Container","children":"{{highPriorityHitRate}}%"},{"type":"Container","children":"Impact Prediction:"},{"type":"Container","children":"{{impactPrediction}}%"}]}]}]},{"type":"Card","props":{"title":"Time Management Analytics","description":"Estimation accuracy and time tracking insights","className":"bg-white"},"children":[{"type":"Progress","props":{"value":"{{timeEstimationAccuracy}}","max":100,"className":"mb-4"}},{"type":"Container","props":{"className":"space-y-2"},"children":[{"type":"Grid","props":{"cols":2,"gap":2,"className":"text-sm"},"children":[{"type":"Container","children":"Estimation Accuracy:"},{"type":"Container","children":"{{timeEstimationAccuracy}}%"},{"type":"Container","children":"Average Task Time:"},{"type":"Container","children":"{{avgTaskTime}}h"},{"type":"Container","children":"Velocity (Tasks/Day):"},{"type":"Container","children":"{{dailyVelocity}}"}]}]}]},{"type":"Card","props":{"title":"Productivity Insights","description":"Overall productivity trends and recommendations","className":"bg-white"},"children":[{"type":"Progress","props":{"value":"{{overallProductivityScore}}","max":100,"className":"mb-4"}},{"type":"Container","props":{"className":"space-y-2"},"children":[{"type":"Grid","props":{"cols":2,"gap":2,"className":"text-sm"},"children":[{"type":"Container","children":"Productivity Score:"},{"type":"Container","children":"{{overallProductivityScore}}/100"},{"type":"Container","children":"Focus Time:"},{"type":"Container","children":"{{focusTimePerDay}}h/day"},{"type":"Container","children":"Task Switching:"},{"type":"Container","children":"{{taskSwitchingRate}}/day"}]}]}]}]},{"id":"escalation-alerts","type":"Card","position":{"row":12,"col":1,"rowSpan":1,"colSpan":4},"props":{"title":"Escalation & Alert Center","description":"Critical tasks requiring Λvi coordination and immediate attention","className":"bg-gradient-to-r from-red-50 to-orange-50 border-red-200"},"children":[{"type":"Container","props":{"className":"space-y-3"},"children":"{{escalationAlerts}}"}]}],"gridConfig":{"columns":4,"rowHeight":100,"margin":[12,12],"containerPadding":[16,16],"responsive":{"xxl":{"columns":4,"breakpoint":1400},"xl":{"columns":4,"breakpoint":1200},"lg":{"columns":3,"breakpoint":996},"md":{"columns":2,"breakpoint":768},"sm":{"columns":1,"breakpoint":576},"xs":{"columns":1,"breakpoint":480}}},"dataBindings":{"totalTasks":"count(tasks)","completedTasks":"count(tasks[status='completed'])","inProgressTasks":"count(tasks[status='in_progress'])","pendingTasks":"count(tasks[status='pending'])","blockedTasks":"count(tasks[status='blocked'])","p0Count":"count(tasks[priority='P0'])","p1Count":"count(tasks[priority='P1'])","p2Count":"count(tasks[priority='P2'])","p3Count":"count(tasks[priority='P3'])","p4Count":"count(tasks[priority='P4'])","p5Count":"count(tasks[priority='P5'])","p6Count":"count(tasks[priority='P6'])","p7Count":"count(tasks[priority='P7'])","completionRate":"(completedTasks / totalTasks) * 100","avgImpactScore":"avg(tasks.impactScore)","timeAccuracy":"timeEstimationAccuracy(tasks)","blockedTasksCount":"count(tasks[status='blocked'])","overdueTasksCount":"count(tasks[dueDate < now() and status != 'completed'])","productivityScore":"calculateProductivityScore(tasks)","timelineItems":"generateTimeline(tasks, 30)","pendingTaskCards":"generateTaskCards(tasks[status='pending'])","inProgressTaskCards":"generateTaskCards(tasks[status='in_progress'])","blockedTaskCards":"generateTaskCards(tasks[status='blocked'])","completedTaskCards":"generateTaskCards(tasks[status='completed']).limit(5)","escalationAlerts":"generateEscalationAlerts(tasks)","priorityAccuracy":"calculatePriorityAccuracy(tasks)","highPriorityHitRate":"calculateHighPriorityHitRate(tasks)","impactPrediction":"calculateImpactPredictionAccuracy(tasks)","timeEstimationAccuracy":"calculateTimeEstimationAccuracy(tasks)","avgTaskTime":"avg(tasks[status='completed'].actualHours)","dailyVelocity":"calculateDailyVelocity(tasks)","overallProductivityScore":"calculateOverallProductivityScore(tasks)","focusTimePerDay":"calculateFocusTime(tasks)","taskSwitchingRate":"calculateTaskSwitchingRate(tasks)"},"interactionHandlers":{"handleSearchFilter":"filterTasksBySearch","handlePriorityFilter":"filterTasksByPriority","handleStatusFilter":"filterTasksByStatus","openTaskCreationModal":"openModal('createTask')","createTask":"submitTaskCreation","clearForm":"resetTaskCreationForm","updateTaskStatus":"handleTaskStatusUpdate","escalateTask":"escalateToLambdaVi","viewTaskDetails":"openTaskDetailModal"},"refreshInterval":15000,"autoSave":true,"realTimeUpdates":true,"webSocketEnabled":true}
